prose: **Frontier orbital gap of ethylene**: **DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry provided as external file input, calculation using PySCF. SCF converged in 6 cycles. HOMO = −7.616 eV, LUMO = −0.180 eV, with a Koopmans-style HOMO–LUMO gap of **7.436 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap approximation). Calculation artifacts were logged at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp2omiw_av/live.json`, and properties were derived self-consistently. No warnings or fallback deviations occurred.
